title: MONIKA'S HOUSE - 211info
text: MONIKA'S HOUSE SHELTER MONIKA'S HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe confidential emergency shelter and a domestic violence crisis hotline for survivors fleeing intimate partner domestic violence. Services for shelter residents include advocacy, case management, and support groups. Eligibility: Domestic violence survivors of all ages and genders who are in imminent physical danger. On-site indoor and outdoor kennels for pets are available. Service and therapy animals are allowed in the shelter. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 469-8620 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 640-5352 Main phone- Business Line (503) 469-8620 Crisis Line (866) 469-8600 Crisis Line Toll-free (503) 469-8419 FAX Crisis Line (503) 469-8620 Toll-Free Crisis Line (866) 469-8600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Confidential location. Public transportation is nearby. Information will be given to clients as needed. Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
